_contextSnippet: We observed high pAKT at the invasive edges of the NF1-P53 tumors, yet minimal pAKT was present in NF1-MET or NF1 tumors. Interestingly, increased pAKT was observed in NF1-P53 tumors after capmatinib or trametinib treatment. Even though AKT expression is comparable across the MPNST lines, pAKT is significantly higher in the NF1-P53 cells at basal conditions
details: Successfully detected high pAKT at invasive edges of NF1-P53 tumors, increased pAKT after capmatinib or trametinib treatment, and significantly higher pAKT in NF1-P53 cells at basal conditions
